skills.description: A comprehensive guide on creating, editing, and analyzing .docx files using various tools and workflows.
trigger_conditions: Need to read or edit text in a .docx file
Required to create a new Word document from scratch
anti_triggers: Simple text replacement without tracked changes

skills.description: This skill automates the process of converting an academic paper written in LaTeX from one publisher's format to another by executing a structured multi-stage workflow, extracting content, mapping it to a new template, and resolving common compilation errors.
trigger_conditions: User requests to convert an existing LaTeX paper to a new journal's format.
User provides an existing .tex file and a new template directory.
User mentions converting from format A to format B.
anti_triggers: User does not provide the source LaTeX file or target template directory.

skills.description: Use the Obsidian CLI to read, create, search, and manage vault content, or to develop and debug Obsidian plugins and themes from the command line.
trigger_conditions: Managing vault content through the Obsidian CLI
Developing or debugging Obsidian plugins and themes from the command line
Desiring shell-driven interaction with a running Obsidian app

skills.description: A user may ask you to create, edit, or analyze the contents of a .pptx file. A .pptx file is essentially a ZIP archive containing XML files and other resources that you can read or edit.
trigger_conditions: or analysis of a PowerPoint presentation
Need to convert HTML slides to PowerPoint format
Working with raw XML files for complex formatting
anti_triggers: Using PowerPoint GUI for simple text edits

skills.description: A comprehensive guide on creating, editing, and analyzing Excel files using Python libraries pandas and openpyxl, with emphasis on preserving formulas and ensuring dynamic updates.
trigger_conditions: User requests creation or modification of Excel files
Data analysis is required for existing Excel files
anti_triggers: Hardcoding calculated values instead of using Excel formulas
